n: In the Shadow of the Stone

steps.t: The Rohirrim-camp may be found along the road north of the Cuthstan, to the west of Stangard. Byrnstan has asked you to visit Frithstan and ask about …
Penda may be found in the Rohirrim-camp along the road north of the Cuthstan, to the west of Stangard. Penda seems to be the only man left at Frithsta…
